title: ranunculastrum gracile
intro: Ranunculastrum gracile, also known as the small-flowered buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Ranunculastrum gracile can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
